case_title: GULINGAN, VIRGILIO et al vs. KELLER, KATHRYN et al

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-26-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND RE NON PAYMENT OF SANCTIONS IF NOT PAID BY 9/17/97 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DIRECT TO PLT'S ATTY. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS
